nasb.text: After these things I saw another angel coming down from heaven, having great authority, and the earth was illumined with his glory.

esv.text: After this I saw another angel coming down from heaven, having great authority, and the earth was made bright with his glory.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，我看見有另一位掌大權柄的天使，從天上降下來，他的榮光照亮了大地。

ccb.text: 之后，我看见另一位执掌大权的天使从天降下，他的荣光照亮了大地。

csbs.text: 这些事以后，我看见另一位天使从天上降下来，他拥有大权；大地被他的荣光照亮了。
